summary: Tested consistency updates across the website for smoke percentages, ethical sourcing messaging, bamboo/bambooless clarification, and new Sustainability page. All requested pages pass verification. Found additional pages with outdated '80%' messaging that were not part of the update scope.

content_consistency_issues.issue: Still shows '80% less smoke' - should be '60%+' for consistency
Multiple references to '80% less smoke' - should be '60%+' for consistency
Meta description shows '80% less smoke' - should be '60%+' for consistency

details: ✓ Page loads correctly with Impact Dashboard
✓ Animated counters showing 50+ trees, 7 families, 12 student years, 60%+ less smoke
✓ Packaging info: PET bottles (reusable) and paper packets (recyclable)
✓ Roadmap showing 2025 current progress, 2026 goals (100 trees), 2027 goals (carbon-neutral)
✓ 'Your Impact' section with order impact breakdown
✓ Tree donation option with ₹10 button and modal working
✓ Bambooless clarification: Only Dhoop is bambooless
✓ Agarbatti uses bamboo sticks with charcoal-free coating
✓ Bamboo sticks with charcoal-free coating mentioned
✓ Shows 'over 60% less smoke' in Low Carbon Footprint card

action_items: Update /app/frontend-next/app/why-zero-charcoal/page.js line 91: Change '80% less smoke' to '60%+ less smoke'
Update /app/frontend-next/app/layout.js line 30: Change meta description '80% less smoke' to '60%+ less smoke'
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Sustainability page well-structured with animated counters using IntersectionObserver
✓ Tree donation modal has proper data-testid attributes for testing
✓ FAQ page correctly clarifies bamboo vs bambooless products
✓ All requested pages have consistent 60%+ messaging
⚠ Additional pages (why-zero-charcoal, our-quality, layout.js) still have 80% - not in original scope but should be updated for full consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: Consistency updates for smoke percentages (60%+), ethical sourcing, and bamboo clarification are complete for the requested pages. New Sustainability page is fully functional with impact dashboard, animated counters, packaging info, roadmap, and tree donation feature. Additional pages (why-zero-charcoal, our-quality, layout.js meta) still have '80%' references that should be updated for full site consistency.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features working correctly. Additional inconsistencies found in pages outside the original update scope.
